title: Project Config
subtitle: Defaults to the global settings. You can customize models for this project only — changes apply to this project only.
fetchModelsFailed: Failed to fetch user model list
noModelsInList: No models of this type are available. Add and enable them in Profile → API / Model configuration (provider API keys required).
noImageModelsBannerBody: Character / location / storyboard / edit dropdowns only list models marked as type “image” and enabled in your configuration. Text-only models (e.g. Qwen, Coding Plan) will not appear here. Add image providers such as FAL, ComfyUI, or Gemini in the configuration center and ensure the provider API key is set.
noVideoModelsBannerBody: Add and enable models of type “video” in Profile → API / Model configuration.
noAudioModelsBannerBody: Add and enable models of type “audio” in Profile → API / Model configuration.
